tableRow.maxContractTerm: No statutory maximum found. Ark. Code Ann. § 6-19-102(a)-(b) and § 6-13-620(6)(D) impose no term cap. Arkansas Procurement Law multiyear cap at § 19-11-238 (7 years total / 4-year original term) applies only to state agencies (§ 19-11-203(30)) and not to school districts (political subdivisions under § 19-11-203(19)).
tableRow.rebidRequired: Not required by state law for transportation services. § 6-21-304 requires bid solicitation only for commodities at or above $20,000 (CPI-adjusted), and § 6-21-301(1) excludes personal and professional services from commodities. Arkansas Procurement Law does not reach school districts. Cooperative purchasing authority in § 19-11-249 is permissive. No transportation-specific statute or Commission/DESE rule requires a competitive process at term-end.
tableRow.renewalMechanics: N/A. No Arkansas statute, Commission rule, or DESE/DPSAFT rule prescribes renewal, extension, evergreen rollover, CPI/fuel escalator, mutual-agreement renewal, board-approval renewal, or agency-approval renewal mechanics specifically for school-district contracts with private student-transportation contractors.
tableRow.districtVariance: Unknown. No official statewide guidance (DESE rule, DPSAFT manual, Arkansas AG opinion, Legislative Audit report, or ASBA model policy) located interpreting contract-term/rebid/renewal rules for district-to-private-contractor pupil transportation services contracts.
